name: Bishop Museum
tagline: Hawaii's biggest museum with a world-class planetarium and a hands-on science center that rivals the mainland.
parking: Free parking on-site in museum lot
bestTime: Arrive at opening on a weekday; planetarium shows sell out so grab tickets first
kamaaina: Kamaaina rate with Hawaii ID; membership pays for itself in 2-3 visits
talkStory: Best for ages 4 and up. The Science Adventure Center is the highlight for kids — erupting volcano model, giant insect displays, and interactive exhibits about Hawaii's natural history. The planetarium show is a must. The Hawaiian Hall with its three-story Victorian architecture teaches kids about Hawaiian culture. Allow 3-4 hours. Keiki under 4 are free.
